## Aeldari, Drukhari, and Harlequin Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Corsair Shade Runner (Cost: 3 Glory)

An Aeldari (besides Corsairs Variant), Drukhari, or Harlequins Warband can take this Mercenary. An Outlaw Warband besides Corsairs can also take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Corsair Shade Runner | 7”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Corsair Shade Runner is equipped with Mesh Armour, a Shuriken Pistol, Triskeles, and a Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Shuriken Pistol.** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on Critical Hit  
* **Triskeles.** 12”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, ASSAULT, CRITICAL  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Raider.** The Corsair Shade Runner has \+1 DICE for all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Slicing Blink.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Corsair Shade Runner can teleport to any location within 6” of it. Then draw a line between its starting position and where it ended this teleport. Up to one model of your choice along that line must roll on the Injury Table.

**Keywords**  
INFILTRATOR

#### 0-1 Corsair Soul Weaver (Cost: 4 Glory)

An Aeldari (besides Corsairs Variant), Drukhari, or Harlequins Warband can take this Mercenary. An Outlaw Warband besides Corsairs can also take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Shade Runner | 7”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Shade Runner is equipped with Mesh Armour, a Shuriken Pistol, Triskeles, and a Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Shuriken Pistol.** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on Critical Hit  
* **Power Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 2

The Corsair Soul Weaver knows the following Psychic Powers:

* **Soul Channel.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the caster can attempt to increase the speed of itself or one ally within 6” of it. On a success, that model has \+2” to its movement speed during its next Activation, or this Activation if the target is the caster.  
* **Soul Heal.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, the caster can attempt to heal itself or an ally within 6” of it. On a success, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the chosen model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.

**Abilities**

* **Raider.** The Corsair Soul Weaver has \+1 DICE for all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Channeler Stones.** The Corsair Soul Weaver treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.

**Keywords**  
PSYKER 1

#### 0-1 Death Jester (Cost: 5 Glory)

An Aeldari or Drukhari Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Death Jester | 8”/Infantry | \+3 | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Death Jester is equipped with a Shrieker Cannon, a Jester’s Blade, a Flip Belt, and a Holo Suit. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Shrieker Cannon.** 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE, GAS, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 1\. If this attack takes an enemy Out of Action, it explodes, and each model within 2” of it must roll on the Injury chart with \-1 DICE. This Injury is considered to have the SHRAPNEL Keyword.  
* **Jester’s Blade.** Melee, BLOCK, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo, CRITICAL, TWO-HANDED  
* **Flip Belt.** The wearer automatically succeeds on Climb and Jump Success Rolls and does not suffer Injury rolls due to falling. It also has \+1 DICE to Diving Charge Success Rolls and does not fall Down or suffer an Injury roll due to failing a Diving Charge.  
* **Holo Suit.** All attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit against the wearer.

**Abilities**

* **Deadly Hunter.** The Death Jester can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon it wields.  
* **Swift.** The Shadowseer has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, HARLIQUIN

#### 0-2 Dragon Huntmate (Cost: 2 Glory)

Only an Aeldari (Exodites) Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Dragonling Pack | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 60 x 35mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Dragon Huntmate is equipped with its Bite. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bite.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Hunting Companion.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Dragon Huntmate forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner. Its owner ignores the Dragon Huntmate when making ranged attacks against enemies the Dragon Huntmate is in melee with.  
* **Raptor.** The Dragon Huntmate has \+1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, LARGE, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Dragonling Pack (Cost: 3 Glory)

Only an Aeldari (Exodites) Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Dragonling Pack | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 40-50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Dragonling Pack is equipped with its Swarming Bites. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Swarming Bites.** Melee, Hits all targets in melee during wielder’s Activation

**Abilities**

* **Raptor Pack.** The Dragonling Pack has \+1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, SWARM, TOUGH

#### 0-2 Mandrake (Cost: 4 Glory)

Only a Drukhari Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Mandrake | 8”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Mandrake is equipped with its Baleblast and a Glimmersteel Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Baleblast.** 18”, ASSAULT, CRITICAL, \-DICE do not apply to Injury rolls  
* **Glimmersteel Blade.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Dodge.** All attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit against the Mandrake.  
* **Shadow Passage.** Once during its Activation, when the Mandrake moves into contact with a piece of scenery at least 2” wide, it can pass through the shadows. Remove the Mandrake and immediately place it into contact with any other piece of scenery over 2” wide on the battlefield, including on top of or inside it. The Mandrake then continues its movement as normal. This ability can be used as part of any movement the Mandrake takes during its Activation (Standard Move, Retreat, Charge, Dash etc.). If it is used as part of a Charge, it does not need to take the most direct route possible, but it still selects the target as normal (Line of Sight, within 12” etc.).

**Keywords**  
INFILTRATOR, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Pathfinder (Cost: 5 Glory)

Only an Aeldari Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Pathfinder | 7”/Infantry | \+2 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Pathfinder is equipped with Mesh Armour, a Long Rifle, a Shuriken Pistol, a Power Blade, and an Aeldari Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Long Rifle.** 48”, \+1 DICE, CRITICAL, TWO-HANDED  
* **Shuriken Pistol.** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on Critical Hit, PISTOL  
* **Power Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Aeldari Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Bringer of the True Death.** When it hits with a ranged attack, the Pathfinder must spend only 3 BLOOD MARKERS to cause a Bloodbath on an enemy, even if it is not Down.  
* **Hunter Unseen.** The Pathfinder cannot be the target of attacks made at Long Range, even if those attacks would normally ignore Long Range or hit automatically.

**Keywords**  
INFILTRATOR

#### 0-1 Shadowseer (Cost: 6 Glory)

An Aeldari or Drukhari Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Shadowseer | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Shadowseer is equipped with a Neuro Disruptor, a Mist Staff, a Flip Belt, and a Holo Suit. It can make a ranged attack with each of its ranged weapons when it takes a Shoot Action. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Neuro Disruptor.** 12”, \-1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, ASSAULT, STUN, PISTOL  
* **Mist Staff.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC  
* **Flip Belt.** The wearer automatically succeeds on Climb and Jump Success Rolls and does not suffer Injury rolls due to falling. It also has \+1 DICE to Diving Charge Success Rolls and does not fall Down or suffer an Injury roll due to failing a Diving Charge.  
* **Holo Suit.** All attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit against the wearer.

The Shadowseer knows the following Psychic Powers.

* **Fog of Dreams.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the caster or one ally it can see within 6” of it can hide if any piece of scenery it is touching can block line of sight in any direction, even partially, regardless of whether an enemy currently has a clear line of sight. If successful, enemies cannot target the affected model with ranged attacks or Charges. Weapons with the Keyword BLAST it as normal if it is in the radius of the weapon. This effect ends if the affected model moves from its exact position in any way, it makes a Ranged Attack, or an enemy model comes within 1.5” of it.  
* **Treacherous Illusion.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, choose one weapon carried by an enemy model within 8” of the caster. On a success, the model carrying that weapon must make an attack with it against the target of your choice. On a failure, the model can instead make an attack with any of its weapons against any target of its choice. This power cannot be used while in close combat.

**Abilities**

* **Swift.** The Shadowseer has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, HARLIQUIN, PSYKER 2

#### 0-1 Shadow Spectre (Cost: 6 Glory)

Only an Aeldari (besides Corsairs or Exodites) Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Shadow Spectre | 10”/Flying | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Shadow Spectre is equipped with Aspect Armour, a Prism Rifle, a Blade, and an Aeldari Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Prism Rifle.** TWO-HANDED  
  * Dispersed: 18”, BLAST 3”  
  * Focused: 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Aeldari Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL. Counts as Headgear.

**Abilities**

* **Ghostlight.** The Shadow Spectre can form a Fireteam with any one other model in your Warband. After the Shadow Spectre hits an enemy with its Focused Prism Rifle, the other model in its Fireteam must spend only 3 BLOOD MARKERS to cause a Bloodbath on that target with a ranged weapon during the same Activation.  
* **Presentient Robes.** All attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit against the Shadow Spectre.

**Keywords**  
AELDARI, FLYING, SKIRMISHER, FIRETEAM

#### 0-1 Solitaire (Cost: 5 Glory)

An Aeldari or Drukhari Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Solitaire | 10”/Infantry | N/A | \+3 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Solitaire is equipped with two Harlequin’s Kisses, a Flip Belt, and a Holo Suit. It IGNORE OFF-HAND when attacking with these blades. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Harlequin’s Kiss.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE  
* **Flip Belt.** The wearer automatically succeeds on Climb and Jump Success Rolls and does not suffer Injury rolls due to falling. It also has \+1 DICE to Diving Charge Success Rolls and does not fall Down or suffer an Injury roll due to failing a Diving Charge.  
* **Holo Suit.** All attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit against the wearer.

**Abilities**

* **Blur of Movement.** The Solitaire has \+2 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, HARLIQUIN, STEALTH, TOUGH
